/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-antenna-test-default.dylib -install_name @rpath/libns3.37-antenna-test-default.dylib "CMakeFiles/libantenna-test.dir/test/test-angles.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libantenna-test.dir/test/test-degrees-radians.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libantenna-test.dir/test/test-isotropic-antenna.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libantenna-test.dir/test/test-cosine-antenna.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libantenna-test.dir/test/test-parabolic-antenna.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/libantenna-test.dir/test/test-uniform-planar-array.cc.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.13/Frameworks -Wl,-rpath,/Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-antenna-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-core-default.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgsl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgslcblas.dylib
